About Organization

The State Bank of India is a leading public sector bank in India.

As per official notification, the bank has released the SBI Probationary Officers PO Recruitment 2026 notification.

About the Programme

The SBI Probationary Officers PO Recruitment 2026 is a job opportunity for graduates to join the State Bank of India as Probationary Officers.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for the position of Probationary Officers in the bank.

The SBI Probationary Officers PO Recruitment 2026 is a great opportunity for graduates to join the State Bank of India as Probationary Officers.

The recruitment process will include a pre-exam training, phase I pre-exam, and phase II main exam, and the selected candidates will be appointed as Probationary Officers in the bank.
